benzinga_emily.name: Emily Goldvekht
benzinga_emily.subject: SEC Catalyst Intelligence Feed — Licensing Inquiry
benzinga_emily.body:
Hi Emily,

I run Catalyst Edge — a daily SEC research intelligence feed that surfaces high-probability catalyst setups before market open. Saw your role covers API partnerships at Benzinga and thought this might be worth 5 minutes of your time.

What the feed delivers each morning by 3:30 AM ET:
- 300+ EDGAR filings parsed daily (8-K, Form 4, S-3, 13D/G)
- 1,600+ tickers scored on gap probability, volume ratio, filing sentiment, and insider signal
- Structured output: ticker, catalyst type, score, filing URL, squeeze signal
- 90-day live track record: 41% of picks hit +2% intraday, 5.0% avg intraday high

This is a research intelligence feed — it surfaces what's worth watching, not what to trade. Analysts and subscribers make the call.

Currently powering a free newsletter (catalystedge.beehiiv.com) with a 44% open rate among active traders.

Open to a licensing arrangement, API feed, or white-label integration. Happy to send a sample data file so you can evaluate the signal quality directly.

Worth a quick call?

Best,
Frantz
Catalyst Edge
opensource@example.com
https://catalystedge.beehiiv.com

quantconnect_jared.name: Jared Broad
quantconnect_jared.subject: Re: SEC EDGAR Gap Scanner — Following Up (June)
quantconnect_jared.body:
Hi Jared,

Following up as promised — you mentioned touching base in 2-4 months, so June felt right.

Since we last spoke, the scanner has processed 90+ days of live picks. Current performance across ~1,800 picks:
- 41% hit +2% intraday
- 20% hit +5% intraday
- 5.0% average intraday high

The data feed runs nightly at 3:30 AM ET — structured CSV output (ticker, gap score, catalyst type, filing URL, volume ratio) — ready before pre-market opens.

Still open to licensing the feed, a white-label integration, or a rev-share. Happy to share a sample data file if useful.

Worth a 20-minute call?

Best,
Frantz
Catalyst Edge
opensource@example.com
https://catalystedge.beehiiv.com
